title: Philosophy, Ethics, and Safety of AI
description: The philosophical limits of AI, the Chinese Room, algorithmic fairness metrics, k-anonymity, differential privacy, fault tree analysis, and the value alignment problem.

sections.title: §28.1 The Limits of AI — Arguments explorer & Turing Test timeline
§28.2 Can Machines Think? — Chinese Room simulation & consciousness theories
§28.3 Ethics Taxonomy & Future of Work — principles + automation risk explorer
§28.3.3 Fairness & Bias — COMPAS-style demo with threshold controls
§28.3.7 AI Safety — Fault tree analysis & value alignment simulator
